name: AirPods Max 2
description: The ultimate over-ear personal listening experience. AirPods Max 2 deliver stunning high-fidelity audio with Active Noise Cancellation, Transparency mode, and Personalized Spatial Audio.

name: AirPods 4
description: The next evolution of sound and comfort. AirPods 4 feature the Apple H2 chip, Active Noise Cancellation, and a completely redesigned fit for all-day comfort.

specs.label: Battery
specs.value: Up to 6 hours (30 hrs with case)

name: Apple iPad Air 13-inch (M4)
description: iPad Air with the Apple M4 chip in a beautiful 13-inch design. Features Apple Intelligence, a stunning Liquid Retina display, Touch ID, advanced cameras, and Wi-Fi 7.

name: Apple iPad Air 11-inch (M4)
description: iPad Air with the Apple M4 chip packs even more performance into a beautiful 11-inch design. Features Apple Intelligence, Liquid Retina display, Touch ID, and Wi-Fi 7.

name: Apple iPad 11-inch (A16)
description: The 11-inch iPad is more capable than ever with the superfast A16 chip, a stunning Liquid Retina display, advanced cameras, fast Wi-Fi 6, and USB-C connector.

name: Apple iPad Pro 13-inch (M5)
description: iPad Pro with the Apple M5 chip delivers extraordinary performance on a stunning 13-inch Ultra Retina XDR display. Features Neural Accelerators for AI, LiDAR scanner, Face ID, and Wi-Fi 7.

name: Apple iPad Air 11-inch (M3)
description: iPad Air with the powerful M3 chip built for Apple Intelligence. Features a stunning 11-inch Liquid Retina display, Touch ID, Wi-Fi 6E, and USB-C connector.

name: Apple iPad Air 13-inch (M3)
description: iPad Air with the powerful M3 chip in a large 13-inch design built for Apple Intelligence. Features Liquid Retina display, Touch ID, advanced cameras, and Wi-Fi 6E.

name: Apple iPad mini (A17 Pro)
description: The full iPad experience in an ultraportable 8.3-inch design. Features the ultrafast A17 Pro chip, Apple Intelligence, Liquid Retina display, and compatibility with Apple Pencil Pro.

name: Apple iPad Pro 11-inch (M5)
description: iPad Pro with the Apple M5 chip delivers extraordinary performance on a stunning 11-inch Ultra Retina XDR display. Features Neural Accelerators for AI, LiDAR scanner, Face ID, and Wi-Fi 7.

name: iPhone 16
description: Amazing performance. Durable design. iPhone 16 features the A18 chip, Camera Control, a 48MP Fusion camera, Action button, and all-day battery life.

name: iPhone 16 Pro
description: iPhone 16 Pro with the A18 Pro chip, ProMotion display, and the most advanced camera system ever in an iPhone. Features Apple Intelligence, titanium design, and USB 3 speeds.

name: iPhone 17
description: Even more delightful. Even more durable. iPhone 17 features the A19 chip with Dual Fusion camera system, Apple Intelligence, and all-day battery life.

specs.label: Special Features
specs.value: Apple Intelligence, Action Button, Camera Control

name: iPhone 17e
description: Feature stacked. Value packed. iPhone 17e delivers incredible performance with the A18 chip, Apple Intelligence, and a clean single-camera design at a great price.

name: iPhone 17 Pro Max
description: iPhone 17 Pro Max. Innovative design for ultimate performance and battery life. Features the A19 Pro chip, ProMotion OLED display, Pro Fusion camera system with 5x optical zoom, and titanium design.

specs.label: Special Features
specs.value: Apple Intelligence, Action Button, Camera Control

name: iPhone Air
description: The thinnest iPhone ever. With the power of pro inside. iPhone Air features the A19 chip, a stunning 6.7-inch display, and an incredibly thin design at just 5.5mm.

specs.label: Special Features
specs.value: Apple Intelligence, Action Button, Camera Control

name: MacBook Air 13" and 15" (M4)
description: Thin. Fast. Powerful and portable. MacBook Air with M4 chip delivers up to 18 hours of battery life, a stunning Liquid Retina display, and blazing performance for everyday tasks.

name: MacBook Neo (2026)
description: The magic of Mac at a surprising price. MacBook Neo brings the power of Apple silicon in an ultra-affordable package — perfect for students, creatives, and everyday users.

name: MacBook Pro 14" and 16" (M4 Pro)
description: The most advanced Mac laptops for demanding tasks. MacBook Pro with M4 Pro chip delivers extraordinary performance, a world-class Liquid Retina XDR display, and up to 24 hours of battery life.

name: Apple Watch SE 3
description: Essential health features at a great value. Apple Watch SE 3 tracks your activity, heart rate, sleep, and more with a bright always-on display.

specs.label: Health
specs.value: Heart rate, Blood oxygen, Sleep tracking, Crash Detection

name: Apple Watch Series 11
description: The ultimate way to watch your health. Apple Watch Series 11 features advanced health sensors, a beautiful always-on display, and breakthrough features for fitness and wellness.

specs.label: Health
specs.value: Heart rate, Blood oxygen, ECG, Sleep tracking, Temperature

specs.label: Battery
specs.value: Up to 18 hours (36 hrs Low Power Mode)

name: Apple Watch Ultra 3
description: The ultimate sports and adventure watch. Apple Watch Ultra 3 is built for extreme athletes and adventurers with a titanium case, precision dual-frequency GPS, and up to 72 hours of battery life.

name: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
description: The ultimate Galaxy experience. Galaxy S26 Ultra features a built-in S Pen, Snapdragon 8 Elite chip, a 200MP pro-grade camera, and Galaxy AI for next-level productivity.

name: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7
description: Unfold a new reality. Galaxy Z Fold7 delivers a smartphone and tablet in one with a massive foldable display, Snapdragon 8 Elite chip, and Galaxy AI features.

name: Samsung Galaxy Watch8
description: A smarter watch for a smarter life. Galaxy Watch8 features advanced health sensors, Galaxy AI coaching, and a sleek design with up to 40 hours of battery life.

specs.label: Health
specs.value: Heart rate, Blood oxygen, ECG, Body composition, Sleep coaching

name: PlayStation 5 (PS5) Disc Edition
description: Play has no limits. The PS5 console delivers ultra-high-speed SSD, ray tracing, 4K gaming at up to 120fps, and the revolutionary DualSense wireless controller with haptic feedback.

name: DualSense Edge Wireless Controller
description: The ultimate PS5 controller for competitive play. DualSense Edge features fully remappable buttons, interchangeable stick caps, adjustable trigger travel, and built-in profiles.

specs.label: Features
specs.value: Remappable buttons, Adjustable triggers, Profile switching

name: MSI Cyborg 15 B2RWFKG
description: Designed for the next generation of gamers. MSI Cyborg 15 features a transparent design with RGB lighting, AMD Ryzen 7 CPU, NVIDIA RTX 4060 GPU, and a 144Hz FHD display.

name: MSI Vector 18 HX AI
description: The ultimate gaming powerhouse. MSI Vector 18 HX AI features Intel Core Ultra 9 processor, NVIDIA RTX 5080 GPU, a massive 18-inch Mini LED QHD+ 240Hz display, and AI-powered performance.

name: MacBook Pro 14" (M5)
description: Supercharged by M5. MacBook Pro 14" delivers breakthrough performance with the M5 chip, a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display with ProMotion, up to 24 hours of battery life, and a thin, light design.

name: MacBook Air 15" (M4)
description: The thin and light powerhouse just got bigger. MacBook Air 15" with M4 chip delivers incredible performance in a stunning 15.3-inch design with up to 18 hours of battery life.

name: MacBook Pro 16" (M4 Pro)
description: The most powerful MacBook Pro ever. With M4 Pro chip, a breathtaking 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, and up to 24 hours of battery life — for pros who refuse to compromise.

images.alt: MacBook Pro 16 M4 Pro - Space Black

name: AirPods 4 (Active Noise Cancellation)
description: AirPods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation — the same open-ear fit you love, now with ANC that adapts to your ear shape. Features H2 chip, Transparency mode, and up to 30 hours total battery.

specs.label: Battery
specs.value: Up to 6 hours (30 hrs with case)

name: AirPods Pro 2
description: The world's best AirPods. AirPods Pro 2 deliver up to 2× more Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, Personalized Spatial Audio, and a USB-C MagSafe Charging Case.

name: AirPods Pro 3
description: Next generation hearing begins. AirPods Pro 3 bring clinical-grade hearing health features, even more powerful ANC, and the new H3 chip for the most immersive listening experience ever.

specs.label: Battery

name: MacBook Air 13" M4 (2025)
description: Thin. Portable. Insanely capable. The 2025 MacBook Air 13" with M4 chip delivers extraordinary performance in a fanless design with up to 18 hours of battery life and Apple Intelligence.
